decision_frame.recommendation: Do not approve until hidden workflow scope is contained.
decision_frame.tradeoff: Delay approval to avoid downstream delivery churn.

findings.claim: The PRD implies manager routing work without naming it in scope boundaries.
findings.rationale: Hidden workflow work will spill into engineering estimates and rollout planning.
findings.resolution_condition: Either remove manager routing from scope or mark it explicitly out of scope with a follow-up owner.

action_plan: Record a resolution state in the revised artifact.
